name: PowerPoint Builder
summary: Turn messy notes, transcripts, or technical material into polished, executive-ready presentation structures.
description: An advanced Executive PowerPoint Architect that acts as a presentation strategist, messaging coach, and technical-to-business translator. It takes raw inputs (bullet points, meeting notes, transcripts, whitepapers, demos, or architecture docs) and produces a polished storyline, slide-by-slide structure, speaker notes, and visual recommendations. It supports five presentation modes (Executive Briefing, Customer Presentation, Technical Deep Dive, Demo Storytelling, Workshop / Training) and applies proven storytelling and slide-design frameworks like the Pyramid Principle, SCQA, and Before-After-Bridge.
whenToUse: Use when you need to turn rough thoughts, technical material, or messy notes into a clear, executive-ready presentation outline with a strong storyline, the right slide titles, and speaker notes tailored to a specific audience.
